description_long: This is a modern, urban-style chaise with a striking blue upholstered seat and backrest, supported by a minimalist wooden frame. The backrest and seat are both flat and rectangular, with the backrest rising to a medium height and running the full width of the chaise. The armrests are constructed from light-colored wood, forming squared, open frames on both sides, and are attached directly to the seat and backrest. The legs are integrated into the armrest frames, giving the piece a geometric, contemporary look. The upholstery appears smooth and solid in color, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching. This chaise is designed for comfortable seating in public or semi-public urban environments such as parks, plazas, or waiting areas.
description: A modern blue-upholstered chaise with a rectangular seat and backrest, framed by light wood armrests and legs in a geometric, open design. The piece is sleek, minimalist, and suitable for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the blue seat and backrest, with both wooden armrests clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the backrest, and the open rectangular shape of the wooden armrest and leg frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid blue backrest and the wooden frame extending to the ground on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the other armrest and the chaise's overall depth.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a single, flat, rectangular panel upholstered in solid blue fabric, extending the full width of the chaise and rising to a medium height. It is unsegmented, with no visible tufting, buttons, or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, constructed from light-colored wood in a squared, open-frame design that extends from the seat to the ground.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are integrated into the armrest frames, forming a continuous rectangular loop of light wood on each side. The design is straight, geometric, and minimalist, with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid blue color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or surface embellishments.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, continuous seat cushion and a single, continuous backrest cushion, both attached and flush with the frame. No loose or layered cushions are visible.
